label: Transparent Painted Lady motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Painted Lady transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated Painted Lady butterfly motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A Painted Lady butterfly with accurate anatomy, open wings, orange and warm apricot wing panels, black and charcoal vein structure, cream-white spots, subtle rosy pink flower-reflected tones, small pale edge markings, natural wing-scale texture, slender dark body and antennae.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show both open wings, body, antennae, and edge markings without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves orange, black, cream, and soft pink wing detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for transparency removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no monarch butterfly, no swallowtail tails, no flowers as objects, no meadow scene, no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no second insect.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Input images: the visible transparent Painted Lady butterfly motif is the reference image; derive palette, texture rhythm, component language, and campaign mood from it.
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive 16:9 light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Painted Lady" / "Painted Lady Butterfly". It is a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible source reference for a portable campaign system used by field teams in an open meadow context.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 4K-class visual density, clean product UI layout, large readable labels.
Required visible sections: title, motif story, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
Palette: use only motif-derived colors: painted orange, ember apricot, wing black, charcoal vein, spot cream, meadow parchment, pollen buff, soft flower pink, warm umber. No blue, no purple gradients, no unrelated greens except tiny muted body-olive if visibly from the butterfly.
Typography: crisp English product UI samples plus Japanese typography examples such as "キャンペーン", "応募者", "進捗", "設定"; font guidance should feel multilingual and operational.
Components: 8px radius buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, tooltip, popover, calendar, table rows, command palette, search field, sidebar navigation, top nav, dashboard cards, compact charts, empty/loading/error states.
Visual language: Painted Lady wing-cell panels, black vein dividers, cream spot markers, orange primary actions, flower-pink highlight states, parchment surfaces, subtle wing-scale texture, practical portable campaign system details.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no monarch label, no swallowtail, no stock photos, no random logos, no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no watermark, no tiny unreadable token table.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Input images: the visible transparent Painted Lady butterfly motif and the visible light-mode board are references. Preserve the same system identity, layout coverage, campaign-system UI vocabulary, 8px radii, and motif-derived palette roles.
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive 16:9 dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Painted Lady" / "Painted Lady Butterfly". It must be the same portable campaign system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 4K-class visual density, dark product UI layout, large readable labels.
Required visible sections: title, Dark Mode, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
Palette: use only motif-derived dark colors and highlights: deep wing black, charcoal vein, warm umber, painted orange, ember apricot, spot cream, meadow parchment highlights, pollen buff, flower pink, restrained body olive if needed. No blue, no neon, no purple gradients.
Typography: crisp English product UI samples plus Japanese typography examples such as "キャンペーン", "応募者", "進捗", "設定"; multilingual operational tone.
Components: 8px radius buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, tooltip, popover, calendar, table rows, command palette, search field, sidebar navigation, top nav, dashboard cards, compact charts, empty/loading/error states.
Visual language: dark wing-cell panels, charcoal vein dividers, cream spot markers, orange primary actions, flower-pink highlight states, parchment/cream text, subtle wing-scale texture, practical portable campaign workflow details.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no monarch label, no swallowtail, no stock photos, no random logos, no unrelated bright colors, no pure flat black canvas, no generic purple or blue gradients, no watermark, no tiny unreadable token table.
